démarche
gait, effort, process
dé-
inverse, causality, intensification
manger
eat
marcher
walk
gagner
win
+1sg
First-person singular, first conjugation, present tense
+2sg
Second-person singular, first conjugation, present tense
+inf
Infinitive, first conjugation
+1pl
First-person plural, first conjugation, present tense
